description: A customer has moved their headquarters and needs to update their primary billing address.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's account in the CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the customer's main profile.

nodes.task_description: Take the new address information from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent records the new billing address.

nodes.task_description: Update the billing address on the customer's master record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the address in the system.
